# Knight Logics
> Custom website design, local SEO, business automation, and desktop app development studio. Based in Safety Harbor, FL (Tampa Bay metro). Serving small businesses locally and worldwide.

## Contact
- Website: https://knightlogics.com
- Email: support@knightlogics.com
- Phone: +1-813-773-5553
- Location: Safety Harbor, FL 34695 (Tampa Bay, FL)
- Founder: Nicholas Knight

## Services

### Custom Website Design & Local SEO
Hand-coded, fast-loading business websites paired with Google Business Profile optimization and local SEO for the Tampa Bay area. No page builders, no recurring platform fees.
URL: https://knightlogics.com/service-websites.html

### AI & Business Automation
Workflow automation, API integrations, webhook pipelines, and internal tooling to reduce manual work and improve operational reliability for small businesses.
URL: https://knightlogics.com/service-ai-automation.html

### E-Commerce Development
Shopify store development, custom Firebase + Stripe checkout systems, Snipcart integration, inventory automation, and dropshipping pipeline tooling.
URL: https://knightlogics.com/service-ecommerce.html

### Custom Desktop Applications
Windows desktop apps built with Python + PyInstaller. Shipped products include AI video upscaling, automated video narration/production tools, and display management utilities.
URL: https://knightlogics.com/service-desktop-apps.html

## Products

### PixelForge AI
AI-powered video upscaling desktop application for Windows. Uses Real-ESRGAN and FFMPEG for 4× upscaling with noise reduction. Free download.
URL: https://knightlogics.com/pixelforge-ai.html
Download: https://github.com/Knight-Logics/v11b-upscaling-app/releases/latest/download/PixelForge-AI.exe

### VideoForge Studio
Automated YouTube video narration and production app. Flask-based hybrid desktop tool for AI-assisted Top 5 listicle video creation.
URL: https://knightlogics.com/videoforge.html
Download: https://github.com/Knight-Logics/VideoForge-Studio/releases/download/v0.4.4/VideoForge-Studio-Installer.exe

### Display Control+
Windows multi-monitor display configuration switcher with system tray integration. Instantly switch between monitor layouts without digging into Windows settings.
URL: https://knightlogics.com/display-control-plus.html
Download: https://github.com/Knight-Logics/display-control-plus/releases/download/v1.0.16/DisplayControlSetup_v1.0.16.exe

### Auto Vid Compiler
Automated video clip gathering and compilation tool. Watches folders, assembles clips, and optionally uploads to platforms.
URL: https://knightlogics.com/auto-vid-compiler.html
Download: https://github.com/Knight-Logics/Auto-Video-Editor-and-Compiler/releases/download/v1.0/BMagic_AutoVidCompiler_PERFECT.exe

## Case Studies

### JNS Construction Services (jnsbuilds.com)
Full static site build for a Florida construction LLC. Custom branding, schema markup, sitemap, and local SEO targeting Pinellas County.
URL: https://knightlogics.com/case-study-jns.html

### Knight Group Real Estate (knightgroup.com)
Custom real estate agency website for a Tampa Bay residential real estate team. Gallery pages, service area targeting, inquiry forms.
URL: https://knightlogics.com/case-study-knight-group.html

### Knight Logics Portfolio Site (knightlogics.com)
Self-built portfolio and service website. Hand-coded HTML/CSS/JS, structured data, IndexNow, Bing/Google Search Console, and GA4 analytics.
URL: https://knightlogics.com/case-study-knight-logics.html
